🧾 Summary of Correct Concepts from Answers
Use LEFT JOIN when you need all users (even those without details/logs).
Use INNER JOIN when you only want users that exist in all tables (logged + detailed).
Sessions are identified by session IDs stored in cookies.
JWT + middleware is used for stateless authentication.
HTTP requests carry headers, body, and method (GET, POST, etc.).
Node.js responds by sending HTML or JSON, which the browser converts to visible content.
